name: rung_22_robustness_hard_retarget_lineage
utterances: Sol is the parent of Ria.
Ria is the parent of Tao.
Tao is the parent of Uma.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y.
If X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
To be precise, that middle link was off, so retract parent(ria, tao).
Let's correct it this way instead: Vic is the parent of Tao.
And Ria is the parent of Vic.
After that repair, does Sol still end up as Uma's ancestor?
